title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Mayor, Honorable Caesar P. Perez to Enter Into a Deed of Usufruct for and in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) with the Supreme Court of the Philippines for the Use of the Lorenzo C. Meneses, Jr. Hall (FORMERLY OCCUPIED BY THE SANGGUNIANG BAYAN) As Regional Trial Court of Los Baños and Further Ratifying the Same. ( AUTHOR :COUNCILOR JANOS S. LAPIZ, 11/09/2020)
